{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603230252059F279653B4646445B913\"}"},"total":2683},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6950721005191593998","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"此书作者水平很高始终绘人一种虚幻而又觉的真实的感觉。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1618340893,"group_id":"6832159930326191117","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4hscP9eB+Yd2S+7WmvW+sSeVEgLfSYpu4pyC3QjUkGv","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776788850\u0026x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"1041985448446508","user_name":"大喜过望的梦原知予"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1041985448446508","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6832159930326191117","book_info":{"abstract":"为救父亲，吴凡不得不做了城里的上门女婿。只是城里人看不起他，家里人除了小姨妹外都百般为难他，特别是妻子，居然不顾他的感受和尊严，和别的男人有着不太正常的关系。一怒之下，吴凡直接回到农村，立志振兴农村，让城里人对自己刮目相看，最终，岳父一家跪着哀求……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/594128d95086a62e7281356b6601a329","author":"雪中银狐","author_id":"","book_id":"6832159930326191117","book_name":"山洞奇遇","book_short_name":"守护农村","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":27,\"name\":\"战神赘婿\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=27\u0026name=战神赘婿\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,
